repo_note: Shared parameters for Phase 4 Waves B–D unified methods (text/structure, chrome, layout helpers).

text_area.notes: Plain multiline only; rich text is out of scope. Tk uses kind Text with default height/width.

static_text.notes: Native static line; prefer portable label() for shared Label kind. DpgText uses default_value.

menu_bar.notes: Empty shell; Tk Menu uses tearoff=0.

tool_bar.notes: Tk maps to ttk.Frame (title unused). DPG uses horizontal DpgGroup.

separator.notes: DPG separator orientation is layout-driven; horizontal flag ignored on DPG.

scroll_panel.notes: Best-effort viewport: Tk Canvas, DPG DpgChildWindow with scroll flags.

spacer.notes: Qt uses QWidget with fixed min/max when dimensions > 0.
